title: MT. PEAK — Himalayan Black Tea · Sourced at Altitude
metaDesc: MT. PEAK — single-origin, organic Himalayan black tea grown at 2,500m in eastern Nepal, plucked by hand. Three expressions: Light & Bright, Mountain Green, Golden Harvest.
heroEyebrow: From the roof of the world
heroSub: Himalayan Black Tea · Single Origin · Nepal
manifestoLines: Most tea is grown for yield.
where thin air and cold nights force the leaf
into a single, slow, deliberate harvest.

originBlocks.p: In eastern Nepal, our gardens sit at 2,500 metres. The mountains do the work no machine can: mist that slows growth, granite soils that sharpen flavour, and a stillness you can taste in the cup.
Two leaves and a bud. Each one chosen by hands that have read these slopes for generations. No shortcuts. No volume targets. Only the standard the leaf deserves.
Organic certified and single-origin — every batch traceable to the garden and the season it was picked. Provenance you can verify, not just believe.

closerP: A tea grown slowly, at altitude, for those who taste the difference.
footerBlurb: Single-origin Himalayan black tea, grown at altitude in eastern Nepal and plucked by hand. Sourced with intention. Crafted for ritual.
footerLegal: © 2026 Mt. Peak — Himalayan Black Tea · Sourced at Altitude · Nepal
